data.title: "The Trump Train", Pop-Jazz Crooner Frank Lamphere Unveils His Upbeat MAGA Song, Celebrating America's Recent Successes & Positive Direction Thanks to Trump Administration Policies
data.description: In an energetic two-minute performance, a musical tribute is dedicated to common-sense, patriotic Americans who support or are considering joining "The Trump Train." This uplifting piece aims to acknowledge and celebrate these individuals. The event took place in Chicago on April 6, 2026, and was a part of efforts to contribute to the nation's success.

data.title: LightPath Technologies Receives Highly Innovative Design Award from The Sterling Council
data.description: LightPath Technologies, Inc. received recognition for its exceptional manufacturing practices in the 2026 Sterling Manufacturing Business Excellence (SMBE) Award Evaluation. The company, listed on NASDAQ as LPTH, was acknowledged for its excellence in the manufacturing industry. The award highlights the company's commitment to quality and innovation in its operations. This achievement was announced in Orlando, Florida, on April 6, 2026.

data.title: Bitmine Immersion Technologies (BMNR) Announces ETH Holdings Reach 4.803 Million Tokens, and Total Crypto and Total Cash Holdings of $11.4 Billion
data.description: Bitmine has received approval to transfer its listing to the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) from NYSE American starting April 9, 2026. The company currently holds 3,334,637 staked ETH, valued at $7.1 billion based on the price of $2,123 per ETH. Additionally, MAVAN (Made in America VAlidator Network) plays a significant role in this transition.
Cheniere reveals Board of Directors shake-up with new changes.

data.title: GBT Technologies set up Cube X Media to launch a nationwide digital media & content platform. #news #GBT #CubeXMedia
data.description: In the latest economic data, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.3% in the past month. This decrease reflects a positive trend in job creation, with a total of 250,000 new jobs added to the economy. Additionally, the stock market has experienced a significant growth, with the main indexes increasing by 3% on average. This boost in the market has been particularly beneficial for the technology sector, which saw a 5% surge in stocks. Overall, these statistics indicate a strong economic performance and instill confidence in the market.

data.title: Diamondback Energy, Inc. Announces Launch of Tender Offers for Any and All of its Outstanding 4.400% Senior Notes due 2051 and 4.250% Senior Notes due 2052
data.description: On April 06, 2026, Diamondback Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: FANG) started tender offers to acquire all outstanding Senior Notes listed in a provided table. The Company, also known as Diamondback, made these cash offers in accordance with the Offer to Purchase dated the same day. This initiative includes a Notice of Guaranteed Delivery and aims to repurchase the specified Notes from interested parties.

data.title: Socket Mobile Expands Shopify Compatibility with Support for SocketScan S721 and S741 Barcode Scanners
data.description: In Fremont, California on April 6, 2026, Socket Mobile, Inc. revealed that Shopify now accommodates the SocketScan S721 and additional devices with the release of version 11.0.0. Socket Mobile, Inc., a prominent supplier of data capture solutions, aims to boost productivity. The mentioned device, SocketScan S721, is specially designed for seamless integration with the Shopify platform. This update is significant for users seeking enhanced efficiency in data capture and delivery.

data.title: CEO Coaching International Clients Achieve Nearly 2X Revenue and 3X Profit Growth Over U.S. Averages
data.description: In Miami on April 6, 2026, CEO Coaching International, a top firm for coaching growth-focused CEOs and entrepreneurs worldwide, announced its 2025 impact data. The data showed that their clients are consistently surpassing national economic benchmarks. The firm's success is evident as their clients have experienced significant growth and success compared to the general economic performance.

data.title: Elbit Systems Awarded $750 Million to Supply PULS™ Rocket Artillery Systems to the Hellenic Armed Forces
data.description: Today, Elbit Systems Ltd. revealed updates on an agreement made on December 16, 2025, between the Israeli Ministry of Defense and the Hellenic authorities. The company, listed on NASDAQ as ESLT and TASE as ESLT, shared news from its headquarters in Haifa, Israel. The agreement involves an undisclosed monetary value and resource commitment from both parties, signifying a significant collaboration.
Reports: Loud explosion sounds in Kuwait heard in Basra, Iraq

data.title: Inspira Technologies Announces Acquisition of the AME Platform from Nano Dimension
data.description: The company has acquired intellectual property, customer-related assets, and commercial operations in a transaction that marks a significant milestone in its strategic roadmap. This move sets the stage for the company's evolution into its next phase of growth and development.

data.title: Abeona Therapeutics® Announces New Employee Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On April 6, 2026, Cleveland-based Abeona Therapeutics Inc. disclosed that it issued equity awards to recently hired non-executive staff. The grants were given in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Abeona Therapeutics Inc. (Nasdaq: ABEO) did not specify the exact number or value of the equity awards given to the new employees.

data.title: Stablecoin Development Corporation Begins Trading on NYSE American Under Ticker “SDEV”
data.description: A company recently announced the successful completion of its corporate name change. Along with this update, the company also shared the latest figures for its SKY holdings and staking metrics. The updated numbers indicate significant changes in both areas. This development signifies a key milestone for the company and its stakeholders as they move forward with the new identity and updated statistics in terms of SKY holdings and staking. This update showcases the company's commitment to transparency and growth, highlighting its progress in these essential areas.

data.title: Snail Games Expands Portfolio with Publishing Agreement for Co-op Party Action Title Dead Party
data.description: In Culver City, California, Snail Games, a prominent independent developer and publisher of interactive digital entertainment, has obtained global publishing rights from Radiation Blue for the game "Dead Party". This co-op party action game combines base defense mechanics with quick-paced multiplayer gameplay. This move aligns with Snail Games' strategy to broaden its portfolio with socially driven gaming experiences. The announcement was made on April 6, 2026, and Snail Games is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol SNAL.
TowneBank has sold its resort property management segment, impacting hundreds of employees.

data.title: Nightfood Holdings, Inc. (dba TechForce Robotics) Announces Strategic Joint Development Agreement with Oncotelic Therapeutics
data.description: On April 6, 2026, TechForce Robotics, Inc. (OTCQB: NGTF) operating as Nightfood Holdings, Inc., based in Temecula, California, disclosed a significant development. The company finalized a Joint Development, Manufacturing, and Licensing Agreement with Oncotelic Therapeutics, Inc. (OTCQB: OTLC). Oncotelic is known for its focus on biotechnology and the integration of artificial intelligence in pharmaceuticals. This partnership marks a strategic move for both companies in the industry.

data.title: TOMI Environmental Solutions, Inc. Announces Surge in SteraMist Adoption Across Compounding Pharmacy Industry Amid Tightening Regulatory Standards
data.description: SteraMist's iHP technology is now expanding into compounding pharmacies, including both 503A and 503B facilities. This move signifies a significant growth opportunity for SteraMist, with a notable increase in their market reach to serve more pharmacies. The inclusion of compounding pharmacies in this expansion is crucial, as they play a vital role in providing customized medications to meet specific patient needs. This development highlights SteraMist's commitment to providing effective and innovative solutions to a wider range of healthcare facilities, leveraging their iHP technology to enhance disinfection capabilities in pharmacy settings.

data.title: Technological Advances, Including AI, Drive Record Number of Loan Unit Originations for 1Q26
data.description: In Boca Raton, Florida, on April 6, 2026, NewtekOne, Inc. (NASDAQ: NEWT) announced a significant achievement as they revealed originating a record 961 loans during the first quarter of 2026. This number represents a substantial 40% surge compared to the same period in 2025. The total dollar volume of loans originated in the first quarter of 2026 reached approximately $391 million, up from $366 million during the first quarter of 2025. The monthly loan origination volume experienced notable growth throughout the quarter, attributed to improvements in the loan origination process which included the integration of additional AI-powered tools to facilitate the launch of the Newtek Seven Day Business Loan™.
Nano Dimension sells AME and Fabrica product lines, paving way for focus on core 3D printing business.

data.title: INNOVATE’s Portfolio Company DBM Global to Pay Cash Dividend
data.description: INNOVATE Corp. (NYSE: VATE) disclosed that its subsidiary, DBM Global Inc. (“DBMG”), a group offering comprehensive steel construction services, will issue a cash dividend totaling around $3 million, equating to $0.78 per share, scheduled for April 28, 2026. Stockholders of DBMG as of April 13, 2026, will benefit from this payout. Notably, as the main shareholder, INNOVATE anticipates obtaining approximately $2.7 million from this distribution, with individual stockholders of INNOVATE not qualifying for the dividend.
